description_long: This is a standard skateboard featuring a black grip tape surface with a single tan stripe running horizontally across the deck. The deck is constructed from layered wood, visible along the sides, and has a slightly concave shape with upturned nose and tail for trick performance. The skateboard is equipped with four small, hard wheels mounted on metal trucks, which are attached to the underside of the deck. The wheels are a light tan color and appear to be made of polyurethane, suitable for street or park use. The grip tape covers most of the deck, providing a rough, grippy texture for secure footing. There are no visible brand logos or elaborate graphics on the deck, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A minimalist skateboard with black grip tape, a tan stripe, wooden deck, and tan wheels on metal trucks. The design is simple and functional, with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and tan stripe across the deck.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the deck, the concave shape, tan wheels, and metal trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail, black grip tape, and tan stripe, similar to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck profile, wheels, and trucks from the other side.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and hard, tan color, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin, silver metal, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black grip tape with a single tan horizontal stripe, no graphics or text
